c.d: The total number of times the app has been downloaded across all platforms. A higher number indicates greater popularity and reach.
c.s: AppMagic, Google Play Store, Apple App Store

c.d: Average rating given by users. A higher rating reflects better user satisfaction.
c.s: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

c.d: Percentage of users who continue to use the app over a period of time. A higher retention rate indicates greater user engagement.
The method by which the app generates revenue (e.g., in-app purchases, ads, subscriptions). A balanced approach enhances user experience.
